name: SHWA[ʃwɑ:]
short_description: SHWA [ʃwɑ:], meaning "choice" in French and pronounced "shwa," invites you to become a god. With the power to erase through your "choices," you hold the ability to alter the fate of the world.
detailed_description:
"SHWA [ʃwɑ:]" is a story-driven single-player game that puts you in the role of a god with the ultimate power: the ability to alter the fate of the world through irreversible choices.

Game Overview

In "SHWA" (meaning "choice" in French, pronounced "shwah"), you wield a divine power to delete or erase elements of existence. Every decision you make reshapes the world in profound and often unexpected ways.

But beware—your choices are final. There’s no going back, and every action carries consequences that ripple through the fabric of existence. With countless possibilities, the fate of the world lies entirely in your hands.

Key Features

  • Irreversible Choices:
    Every decision is permanent, making each playthrough a unique and deeply personal experience.

  • Diverse Endings:
    Discover multiple endings based on your choices, ranging from utopia to complete chaos.

  • Immersive Storyline:
    A richly crafted narrative that explores themes of morality, power, and the consequences of your actions.

  • Player Agency:
    Your decisions have a profound impact on the world, its inhabitants, and its future.

  • Minimalist Aesthetics:
    A striking visual style that emphasizes the weight of your choices and the emptiness left by what you erase.

In "SHWA", the power of choice is yours. Will you save the world, or will your decisions lead to its downfall?
Step into the role of a god and redefine the fate of existence itself.
